overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red jacket walking along a rainy waterfront promenade at dusk. The character passes by a commercial building with an ATM, continues past autumn trees and benches, and walks by a pedestrian crossing signal while rain falls steadily throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront promenade near commercial building

events.description: turns left from building entrance onto the waterfront promenade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement away from the commercial building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light clothing walking ahead on the promenade path

entered.detail: modern building with illuminated ATM and glass storefront
black metal railing separating walkway from the water
trees with orange and red foliage lining the right side of the path
calm water visible beyond the railing in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking past a commercial building with an illuminated ATM, turning onto a rain-soaked waterfront promenade. An NPC pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction as the character moves along the path lined with autumn trees and a metal railing overlooking the water.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade, passing wooden benches and street lamps

entered.detail: wooden benches positioned along the right side of the walkway
tall lamp posts providing artificial illumination along the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the continuous waterfront promenade flanked by autumn trees and empty park benches. The commercial building recedes into the background as street lamps become visible, casting light on the wet pavement while rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with pedestrian crossing signal

events.description: approaches and passes illuminated pedestrian crossing signal

agents.ego_description: walking past the pedestrian signal and continuing along the open waterfront

entered.detail: illuminated walk signal with green arrow mounted on a black pole
faint outline of buildings visible across the water through the rainy haze

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a pedestrian crossing signal displaying a green walk arrow, then continues past it along the open waterfront. The view expands to reveal a distant city skyline across the water through the rainy dusk atmosphere, while the tree line recedes to the mid-ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked waterfront promenade that transitions from a confined urban edge to an expansive view of a distant city skyline. It begins as the character walks past a commercial building with an illuminated ATM, turning onto a wet path lined with autumn trees and a metal railing. As the building recedes into the background, the camera follows the character past empty park benches while street lamps begin to cast a glow over the glistening pavement. The scene then opens up as the character passes a pedestrian crossing signal with a green walk arrow, allowing the view to expand across the water. Finally, the tree line recedes into the mid-ground to reveal the silhouette of a city skyline under the rainy dusk atmosphere.
